name: Davin Industries Ltd
message: Since starting business in 1962, Davin Industries has earned an enviable reputation as an industry leader in precision sheetmetal fabrication and contract batch manufacturing.Operating from one of New Zealand's best-equipped sheetmetal fabrication facilities, Davin combines state-of-the-art production technology with craftsmanship to complete assignments ranging from prototypes through to volume production runs. The Christchurch facility is registered to ISO9001 and applies quality management principles from receipt of order through to delivery of finished goods.
